headlines.description: Bayern Munich cruised to an 8-0 win over Darmstadt 98 on Saturday, with Harry Kane netting a stunning hat trick, to go top of the Bundesliga.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane nets from inside own half in Bayern 8-0 rout

video.headline: Bayern Munich put up 8 second-half goals in epic win
